occupation.evidence: Customer: Main Gulf mein rehta tha. Filhaal main India mein aaya hua hu. Phir jaunga.

occupation_detail.evidence: Customer: Main Gulf mein rehta tha.

temperature.evidence: Customer: Chalo theek hai main aapko ek do mahine baad main aapse consult kar lunga.

objections.quote: Toh filhaal toh main abhi nahi kar sakta hu. 98 bole toh 1 lakh ke kareeb.
Chalo theek hai main aapko ek do mahine baad main aapse consult kar lunga.

monthly_savings_capacity_inr.evidence: Customer: 98 bole toh 1 lakh ke kareeb. Toh abhi toh main ek matlab. Agent: Sir monthly mein aapka ye padega 8,000 ke aas paas sir.

primary_goal.evidence: Agent: Sir jisme pehle hi din se 1 CR ke life cover ke saath-saath medical, pension aur kuch health ke bhi benefit mil jaate hain.

decision_maker_status.evidence: Customer: Chalo theek hai main aapko ek do mahine baad main aapse consult kar lunga.

missed_opportunities: Did not clarify the investment component of the 'combined plan' beyond life/health benefits.

approachability.reasoning: Customer expressed interest in the product but stated they are not ready to commit financially until a couple of months later.

call_narrative.opening_hook: The agent introduced a combined term and investment plan from Tata AIA, and the customer responded with interest.
call_narrative.customer_response: The customer was engaged and asked specific questions about the product features and costs.
call_narrative.key_event: The customer raised a budget objection after hearing the annual premium of 98,000 INR.
call_narrative.ending: The customer requested a callback in one to two months, which the agent acknowledged.

key_quotes: Toh kya plan hai aapka medical insurance ka kya hai?
Toh filhaal toh main abhi nahi kar sakta hu.
Chalo theek hai main aapko ek do mahine baad main aapse consult kar lunga.
